description: AI Council deliberation evaluating whether to relocate 18 deep-loop / coverage-graph runtime files from system-spec-kit/mcp_server/ into the owning deep-* skill folders. 4-seat sk-ai-council via cli-codex gpt-5.5 (3 advocates + 1 adjudicator) ruled SPLIT; ruling superseded by user-directive FULL_ISOLATE_NO_MCP in arc 118.
